---
title: "Chelan County, Washington"
subtitle: "2000"
number: 0
image: /images/chelan_WA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Chelan County, Washington"
categories: ["Transfer"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2016 Transfer Station Operations and Rates Study

Bell & Associates was contracted by Chelan County to evaluate current waste
management operations and to calculate the existing cost of service. Based on
the analysis, changes to the current rate structure and operations were
proposed. The project also entailed an operations efficiency assessment of the
County’s two transfer facilities and the use of County-owned equipment at these
sites. Recommendations were provided to reduce costs, increase revenues and
improve operating efficiencies at the transfer stations.

Reference: Brenda Blanchfield

[By Joe Mabel, CC BY-SA 3.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=4768854)
:::
